title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Blizzard warnings issued from Delaware to Massachusetts as storm threatens East Coast
items.description: Blizzard warnings have been issued for New York City, New Jersey, Boston and communities along the East Coast as a late-winter storm approaches

items.title: Trial begins for Utah mom accused of killing husband then writing a children's book about grief
items.description: A murder trial is set to begin for a Utah mother of three who published a children’s book about grief after her husband’s death and was later accused ...

items.title: FBI director joins US men's hockey team in locker room celebration of Olympic gold medal
items.description: FBI Director Kash Patel joined the American men's hockey players in the locker room for a rowdy celebration of winning the gold medal at the Winter Ol...

items.title: Blizzard warnings cascade across East Coast as winter storm hits
items.description: Snow began falling over parts of the Northeastern U.S. with the onset of an intense winter storm that prompted blizzard warnings throughout the region

items.title: US futures, bitcoin fall and Asian markets are mixed after the Supreme Court nixes Trump's tariffs
items.description: U.S. futures have dropped and Asian shares are mostly higher after the Supreme Court struck down most of President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariffs
